entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation assignedRoles Test Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningProject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningProject identity="Adam Kennedy"> <MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="IIQ" nativeIdentity="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=Engineering,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Add" value="Adam Kennedy@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Add" value="Admin@123"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=ADG4,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> </MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="IIQ" trackingId="df462576335a4f83bd35fd388cd52dd7"> <AccountRequest application="IIQ" nativeIdentity="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=Engineering,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Add" value="Adam Kennedy@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Add" value="Admin@123"/> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=ADG4,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> <ProvisioningTarget assignmentId="f9f541dd410b4c0cadaeaf27b994001e" retain="true" role="Testing"> <AccountSelection applicationId="ADX" applicationName="ADX" selection="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <AccountInfo displayName="ESHIAM\Adam Kennedynew" nativeIdentity="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountSelection> applicationName="ActiveDirectory" selection="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <AccountInfo displayName="Adam Kennedy" nativeIdentity="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountSelection> <AccountSelection applicationId="ADX" applicationName="ADX" selection="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com">
